title: Echo Trim
description: Adds an Echo Shard trim to armor via the Smithing Table.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Wunm6vrOWdQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Smithing
Use an Echo Shard as the trim ingredient in a Smithing Table.

## Appearance
This will apply a dark blue trim to your armor that has a subtle pulsing animation similar to sculk.
